title: taraxacum clandestinum
intro: Taraxacum clandestinum, also known as the hidden dandelion, is a lesser-known species of the Taraxacum genus of dandelion plants. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Taraxacum clandestinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum clandestinum typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
